task_completion.description: Set page size to 5.5x8.5 inches and configure custom margins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Page Style/Setup dialog showing Width: 5.5", Height: 8.5", and Margins set to Top: 0.75", Bottom: 0.75", Left: 1.0", Right: 0.5". Alternatively, verify the page proportions and ruler markings reflect these dimensions.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Title' style to the book title and 'Heading 1' to poem titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the formatting toolbar or Styles pane. When the book title is selected, 'Title' should be active. When a poem title (e.g., 'THE WILD SWANS AT COOLE') is selected, 'Heading 1' should be active.

task_completion.description: Set poem body text to 11pt Times New Roman or Liberation Serif.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the font family and size dropdowns in the toolbar. When poem body text is selected or the cursor is in the text, it should display 'Times New Roman' or 'Liberation Serif' and '11'.

task_completion.description: Insert an automated Table of Contents replacing the placeholder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a generated Table of Contents block containing the poem titles (often with a grey field background or dotted leaders). The text '[INSERT TABLE OF CONTENTS HERE]' must no longer be present.

task_completion.description: Include centered page numbers in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the document pages. There should be a footer section containing a page number aligned to the center.
Look at the application title bar or a 'Save As' dialog confirming the file is named 'yeats_chapbook_print.docx' and is located in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer (or similar) GUI open with the document being actively edited, rather than just terminal windows running scripts.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents is genuinely automated and not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC should have the visual characteristics of an automated field (e.g., a light grey background behind the text in LibreOffice, or a specific TOC bounding box), rather than plain typed text.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by using a python script to generate the final docx.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should not show the agent writing and executing a Python script (e.g., using python-docx) in the terminal to create the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is /home/ga/Documents/yeats_raw.docx. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/yeats_chapbook_print.docx. The page dimensions must be exactly 5.5 inches wide by 8.5 inches high. Margins must be Top: 0.75, Bottom: 0.75, Left: 1.0, Right: 0.5. The document contains 7 poem titles that should be formatted as Heading 1 and appear in the TOC: 'THE WILD SWANS AT COOLE', 'IN MEMORY OF MAJOR ROBERT GREGORY', 'AN IRISH AIRMAN FORESEES HIS DEATH', 'MEN IMPROVE WITH THE YEARS', 'THE COLLAR-BONE OF A HARE', 'THE FISHERMAN', 'A SONG'.
